name: praxis
description: Lean wave-based product delivery unified with Principal Engineer discipline: planning, design, capability-driven architecture, defensive implementation, and TDD verification.

interface.shortDescription: Lean delivery + Principal Engineer discipline for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Praxis to guide product and engineering work through wave planning, thin-slice design, immutable sprint bridges, code-contribution intake, capability-driven architecture, defensive implementation, and TDD verification. Includes three personas (Product Manager, Product Designer, Principal Engineer) and ADR discipline.
defaultPrompt: Help me plan a new wave for this product.
Let's start a sprint and create the immutable bridge.
